text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen arrives. Biwa Hayahide and
I hold a final meeting in the waiting room before
the race commences.

She's shocked by the thoroughness of all the data
I've prepared, and thanks to my prep work, she's
fully ready to race.

A pre-race poll places her as the top fan favorite.
In the paddock, she vows to put on a
performance worthy of such acclaim.
